serverInfo.name: sap.mcp/replication
serverInfo.title: replication
serverInfo.description: MCP server for the replication service.

tools.name: replicateDivision
tools.title: replicateDivision
tools.description: Replicate divisions that should be used as organization data. To find out, which SAP S/4HANA attributes match these API members, see [user guide](https://help.sap.com/viewer/01d581e7150c42f59b5234a76f5e8d2d/latest/en-US/64db67d600b549d2b3bd81c3689c8d95.html)

parameters.name: Content-Encoding
parameters.description: Indicates to the server that the request body has been compressed using the gzip algorithm. It is recommended to compress the payload whenever possible. To be able to use this option, the payload must be compressed using gzip before sending.
